stemHtml: A horizontal white dumb-bell with a black bar across each circular portion, placed in the signal area, indicates that…

options.a: aircraft must land and take off on runways only, but other manoeuvres need not be confined to runways or taxiways.
options.b: aircraft must land, take off, and taxi on runways and taxiways only.
options.c: a parallel runway system is in use.
options.d: glider operations are taking place on a parallel runway.
